contentitemdata.kcc.recipe.Description: Whenever my family goes to dinners for breakfast on our road trips, I always order the egg skillet. I doesn't matter to me what's in it as long as there are eggs involved. The beauty of this dish is that you can include pretty much anything you like - chopped vegetables, shredded cheese, sausage, or shredded chicken
contentitemdata.kcc.recipe.Name: Egg Skillet
